emails.body: RE: ECT Investments, Inc. ("ECT") agreement wtih Monument Derivatives Limited ("MDL") Sara, It is unlikely I will be able to get back to you today on this. I have some other requests I have to fulfill today. Thanks, Sheila To: Glover, Sheila
